note: c2rust-inlined header inline (memutils.h); the C dict-init context switch is represented by scoped MemoryContext (placement diverges only behind the unported fmgr/tsearch boundary, documented in dict-init).
header macro; Datum::from_oid for syscache keys.
header macro; subsumed by typed Datum / dict_data Datum word.
header macro; Form_* reads via SysCacheGetAttrNotNull/heap_deform_tuple.

one callback for all three caches, selected by arg tag; flush-all (mark isvalid=false on every entry); config arm also resets TSCurrentConfigCache. C passes the HTAB address as arg; here a usize tag rides the Datum (debug_assert on unknown).

lazy hash+callback init; single-entry (lastUsedParser) then hash probe; miss->SearchSysCache1(TSPARSEROID), read prsstart/prstoken/prsend/prsheadline/prslextype, validate start/token/end present (same messages), fmgr_info_cxt eager-resolve via fmgr seam (incl headline if valid), insert, lastUsedParser. FmgrInfo members carried as OIDs.

lazy hash + 2 callbacks (TSDICT,TSTEMPLATE); single-entry/hash probe; miss->SearchSysCache1(TSDICT) read dicttemplate/dictname, SearchSysCache1(TSTEMPLATE) read tmplinit/tmpllexize, validate (same messages); dictCtx create-or-reset (ident cleared before reset, set after); if tmplinit valid deserialize_deflist(dictinitoption) + OidFunctionCall1 init -> dict_data; fmgr_info_cxt(lexize); insert. dict_data is the opaque void* init returned. fmgr/tsearchcmds via seams.
create config hash; register TSCONFIGOID + TSCONFIGMAP callbacks. Split out so getTSCurrentConfig can also arm callbacks.

lazy init; probe valid entry; miss->SearchSysCache1(TSCONFIGOID) read cfgparser (validate); systable_beginscan_ordered on pg_ts_config_map (mapcfg=cfgId) seeing maptokentype/mapseqno order; per-token dict lists with MAXTOKENTYPE/MAXDICTSPERTT bounds and out-of-range/out-of-order/too-many errors (same messages); lenmap = maxtoken+1 or 0; copy workspace into cache ctx then copy out into caller mcx. genam/indexam via seams.

cached TSCurrentConfigCache short-circuit; unset/empty -> elog or InvalidOid by emitError; lazy config-cache init; emitError->stringToQualifiedNameList(hard)+get_ts_config_oid(false); else soft parse, null list->Invalid else get_ts_config_oid(true). regproc/namespace via seams.

only when IsTransactionState && MyDatabaseId!=Invalid; soft-parse name -> get_ts_config_oid; invalid: PGC_S_TEST->NOTICE+accept, else reject(false); else fully-qualify newval via SearchSysCache1(TSCONFIGOID)+get_namespace_name+quote_qualified_identifier. guc_strdup OOM->false path has no counterpart (owned String). MyDatabaseId passed explicitly.
store newval + reset TSCurrentConfigCache=Invalid; GUC owns the string in C, folded into the crate-owned variable here.
